title: Zero-Click Future
html: Stub. The thesis underpinning Rankett's pitch: "Users now get answers directly from AI without clicking. Being cited is the new 'ranking #1.'" Captured verbatim as the loading-screen "Did you know?" copy in 2025 12 10 screenshot 2025 12 10 at 3 52 10 am 901d9a7a. Foundational to the AI visibility engine category — if users don't click, then citation/mention is the only valuable surface, and the SEO industry's blue-link orientation is misaligned.
